name: Weiss Schnee |The Grimm Parasite Symbiote|
description:
What if Weiss, while training alone, managed to trip and fall into a puddle of still water? What if that water was inhabited by a mysterious parasite that then merged with her clothes, binding to her forever? Well, look no further! This is exactly what's happening! Do whatever you want – she's stuck with you.

Part 2 of my RWBY |Grimm Parasite Symbiote| series:

Part 1 is Ruby, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 3 is Blake, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 4 is Yang, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 5 is Neopolitan, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Everyone is 18+
